item.title: Glossary
item.description: Some of the terminology I use throughout this blog may be both technical and uncommon, so this page serves as a quick-reference. Table of Contents Vocabulary Type Semantic Type Cardinality Correct on Construction Vocabulary Type A Vocabulary Type is, simply put, a type that becomes part of your core API vocabulary. These are types that convey meaning and purpose in a ubiquitous way to the user. Additionally, they encapsulate their state and project a consistent API to their consumers that helps to ensure correctness.
